assertions.text: The vehicle was traveling at about 60 km/h before being hit.
Something struck the vehicle unexpectedly ('more or less out of nowhere').
There were a couple of rapid jolts in quick succession (two distinct impacts or jolts).
The impacts (rapid jolts) occurred while the vehicle was cruising.
The vehicle went from cruising to fully stopped within about four seconds after the impact(s).
The narrative implies a rapid deceleration to full stop within ~4 seconds (braking or deceleration occurred).
The collision produced rapid jolts and brought the vehicle to a full stop within about four seconds, indicating a significant impact rather than a minor tap.

verdicts.evidence: The GPS speed just before impacts is [63.0](T2) at t=0 start and samples show [60.0 km/h at t=4.0,5.0,6.0](T3); the compute_stats first value is [63.0](T2) and the slice shows consistent [60.0](T3) pre-impact readings, matching 'about 60 km/h'.

Telemetry shows impact spikes on multiple device axes at [t=6.75, 7.41, 7.44 s](T4) but device-frame axes are undocumented so direction/’out of nowhere’ (unexpected direction) is not decidable from sensors alone; GPS or external object bearing is unavailable.

Detect_events found multiple impact spikes including at [t=6.74-6.75], [t=7.41-7.46], and [t=7.75-7.77 s] on accel channels (T4); this supports 'a couple of rapid jolts' with at least two distinct spikes around [6.74 s](T4) and [7.44 s](T4).

GPS speed samples show the vehicle was cruising at [60.0 km/h at t=4–6 s](T3) and impact spikes occurred starting around [t=6.74 s to 7.77 s](T4), so the impacts occurred while the vehicle was cruising.

GPS speed falls from [60.0 km/h at t=6.0 s] to [35.0 km/h at t=8.0 s] (T3/T4) and reaches [0.0 km/h by t=11.0–12.0 s per samples showing 10.0 at t=10 and 0.0 at t=11/12](T3); the main drop to very low speed (<10 km/h) occurs within about [5 s from t~6 to t=11](T3), and the primary stop after impacts is within roughly [4–5 s of impact window where speed went 60→0 over t=7→11 s], consistent within ~1 s of the claimed 'about four seconds'.

Accelerometer integrated delta-v on device axes shows a net change of about [−51.0 km/h on accel_x], with GPS showing speed falling from [60.0→35.0 between t=6–8 s] and to [0.0 by t=11 s] (T2,T3); detect_events also flags sustained decel segments around [5.61–6.9 s and 7.51–8.01 s] (T4), supporting that rapid deceleration occurred.

High-magnitude impact spikes of up to [3.95 g at t=7.44 s] on accel_x and multiple >[2.5 g] spikes across axes (T2,T4), together with GPS speed falling from [60.0 km/h to 0.0 km/h over the event window] (T3,T2), indicate a substantial collision rather than a minor tap.

result.rationale: Telemetry shows the vehicle was traveling near [60.0 km/h pre-impact](T3/T2), sustained multiple high-magnitude impact spikes at [~6.7–7.8 s](T4), and GPS speed dropped to [0.0 km/h by t~11–12 s](T3), supporting the narrative's core claims; direction specifics are unverifiable due to device-frame axis alignment being undocumented (T1).

citations.claim: 0.0 km/h by t=11.0–12.0 s per samples showing 10.0 at t=10 and 0.0 at t=11/12

result.notes: 100 Hz IMU over a 16 s window. Units: accel g, gyro deg/s, speed km/h. Device-to-vehicle axis alignment is NOT documented; do not assume which axis is longitudinal without cross-checking against GPS speed.

accel_x.integrated_delta_v_note: integral of (a - baseline) over the range; device-frame axis, sign/orientation not vehicle-aligned

accel_y.integrated_delta_v_note: integral of (a - baseline) over the range; device-frame axis, sign/orientation not vehicle-aligned

accel_z.integrated_delta_v_note: integral of (a - baseline) over the range; device-frame axis, sign/orientation not vehicle-aligned

result.downsampling: per-bucket sample with the largest |deviation from channel median| is kept

result.thresholds_doc: impact spike: |a-baseline|>2.5g (>=20ms, merged<0.25s); sustained: 0.5s-avg in 0.35-1.2g; rotation: >40.0deg/s for 0.3s; net rotation >60.0deg; speed drop: >=15.0km/h in <=3.0s; brake: 0->1 transitions; CISS impact: max |crash-pulse delta-V|
